name: Delivery driver auto-unlock
description: Camera sees a delivery truck or uniformed courier pull up, Gemini reads the carrier logo / uniform, and vFusion unlocks the delivery door for 30 seconds while logging the arrival to Helix. No buzzer, no shared codes — and every delivery shows up in Verkada Command as a structured event with carrier, confidence, and reasoning so loss prevention has an audit trail.
summary: Motion webhook → Gemini OCR (JSON) → condition on carrier → unlock door + Helix log

config.prompt:
You are watching a delivery / loading-dock / front-door security camera frame. Identify whether a recognized delivery carrier is present (truck branding, uniform, package handling).

Respond with ONLY a JSON object - no prose, no code fence - with exactly three keys:
  "carrier":    one of "fedex", "ups", "amazon", "dhl", "usps", "grubhub", "ubereats", "doordash", "other_courier", or "none". Use "other_courier" for branded vans / uniforms you can't pin to a specific name. Use "none" when no delivery activity is visible.
  "confidence": "high" (clear logo + uniform), "medium" (one strong signal), or "low" (faint / ambiguous). Use "low" when you're unsure.
  "reasoning":  one-sentence explanation of what you saw, max 180 characters.

DO NOT flag situations:
  - A passenger car / pedestrian with no delivery context.
  - Workers in generic vests / hi-viz without carrier branding (use "other_courier" + "low" if uncertain).
  - Empty driveway or scenery.

DO flag:
  - FedEx / UPS / Amazon / DHL / USPS branded trucks, vans, or uniforms.
  - Food delivery uniforms (Grubhub / Uber Eats / DoorDash) with bags.
  - Clearly branded courier vehicle even if the driver isn't visible.

Examples:
  {"carrier": "fedex", "confidence": "high", "reasoning": "FedEx Ground truck with logo clearly visible, driver in purple uniform approaching door."}
  {"carrier": "amazon", "confidence": "high", "reasoning": "Amazon Prime branded van parked, driver in blue vest carrying box."}
  {"carrier": "none", "confidence": "high", "reasoning": "Empty driveway, no vehicles or people visible."}
